title: Directory is not hidden properly with unprivileged overlay
body:
**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

I have pushed an image from this Dockerfile (this image was built with docker, not buildah):
```Dockerfile
FROM centos:7

RUN mkdir -p /dir && \
    echo "foo" > /dir/foo

RUN rm -rf /dir && \
    mkdir /dir && \
    echo "bar" > /dir/bar
```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
$ podman --storage-driver=overlay run --rm docker://flx42/test:opaque ls /dir
bar
foo
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
The final image is expected to only have `/dir/bar`, which is what we get with privileged overlay:
```
$ sudo podman --storage-driver=overlay run --rm docker://flx42/test:opaque ls /dir
bar
```
Unprivileged vfs works fine too:
```
$ podman --storage-driver=vfs run --rm docker://flx42/test:opaque ls /dir
bar
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.3.0-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.5
Git Commit:         e2d7e325f42b58290275b6bc25f1b0c64378aff4
Built:              Thu Apr 25 17:35:23 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
debug:
  compiler: gc
  git commit: e2d7e325f42b58290275b6bc25f1b0c64378aff4
  go version: go1.11.5
  podman version: 1.3.0-dev
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.8-dev
  Conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/libexec/crio/conmon'
    path: /usr/libexec/crio/conmon
    version: 'conmon version , commit: '
  Distribution:
    distribution: ubuntu
    version: "19.04"
  MemFree: 17408999424
  MemTotal: 33697443840
  OCIRuntime:
    package: 'cri-o-runc: /usr/bin/runc'
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.1-dev'
  SwapFree: 0
  SwapTotal: 0
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 12
  hostname: ioctl
  kernel: 5.0.0-13-generic
  os: linux
  rootless: true
  uptime: 72h 6m 52.06s (Approximately 3.00 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries: []
store:
  ConfigFile: /home/fabecassis/.config/containers/storage.conf
  ContainerStore:
    number: 0
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
  - overlay.mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs
  GraphRoot: /home/fabecassis/.local/share/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: extfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  ImageStore:
    number: 1
  RunRoot: /tmp/1000
  VolumePath: /home/fabecassis/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
```

comments.body: I'm assuming the `  - overlay.mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs` in your `podman info` isn't what the other commands ran with? It sounds like you're using kernel overlay elsewhere

> I'm assuming the - overlay.mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs in your podman info isn't what the other commands ran with?

Correct, I `rm'ed` the configuration file in my `HOME` before testing `vfs` as unprivileged, and I believe `sudo podman` will naturally use a different configuration file anyway
@giuseppe Looks like an issue in fuse-overlay?
could you check if https://github.com/containers/fuse-overlayfs/pull/68 works for you?
@giuseppe yes, seems to work for my case, thanks for the quick fix!
